component.name: SeriesInfoTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "loadSeriesInfo" end sub
sub loadSeriesInfo() server = m.top.server username = m.top.username password = m.top.password seriesId = m.top.seriesId
if server = "" or username = "" or password = "" or seriesId = "" m.top.error = "Missing parameters" return end if
' Fetch series info including seasons and episodes infoUrl = server + "/player_api.php?username=" + username + "&password=" + password + "&action=get_series_info&series_id=" + seriesId info = FetchJson(infoUrl)
if info = invalid m.top.error = "Failed to load series info" return end if
' Parse seasons and episodes seasons = [] if info.episodes <> invalid for each seasonNum in info.episodes seasonData = { seasonNumber: seasonNum, episodes: [] }
episodeList = info.episodes[seasonNum] for each ep in episodeList episodeData = { id: ep.id.toStr(), episodeNumber: ep.episode_num, title: ep.title, containerExtension: ep.container_extension, duration: ep.duration, plot: ep.plot, url: server + "/series/" + username + "/" + password + "/" + ep.id.toStr() + "." + ep.container_extension } seasonData.episodes.Push(episodeData) end for
seasons.Push(seasonData) end for end if
m.top.seriesInfo = { info: info.info, seasons: seasons } end sub
function FetchJson(url as string) as object http = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") http.setUrl(url) http.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.initClientCertificates() http.setConnectionTimeout(30) http.setReadTimeout(60)
response = http.getToString() if response = "" or response = invalid then return invalid
return ParseJson(response) end function
